stemHtml:
An aircraft with tricycle landing gear is weighed on jacks. Given the following information, determine the BEM and CG position.

Nose jack located at 161 in aft of datum reads: 6484 kg
Each main wheel jack located at 727 in aft of datum reads: 17 338 kg

options.a: 23 822 kg and the CG position is 634.6 in.
options.b: 23 822 kg and the CG position is 628.8 in.
options.c: 41 160 kg and the CG position is 642.3 in.
options.d: 41 160 kg and the CG position is 637.8 in.
